name: Picnic Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in their jackets until tender.
2. Allow the potatoes to cool completely, then peel and chop into large chunks.
3. In a bowl, mix together mayonnaise, yellow mustard, Louisiana hot sauce, and salt until well combined.
4. Add the chopped potatoes and remaining ingredients (celery, parsley, dill relish, sweet relish, salad olives, and onions) to the dressing.
5. Mix everything well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
6. Allow the salad to cool before serving.
7. If making ahead of time, refrigerate the salad overnight. It may be necessary to add a little more dressing if it becomes dry upon serving.
